title: Authentication, Passwords, Sessions, Cookies, and JOSE · Inference Brief: Session Id Rotation Store
summary: The server stores weak password material, keeps session identifiers across privilege changes, decodes JWTs without validating them, accepts arbitrary algorithms, and treats possession as authorization. Planned artifact: Add and verify the httpsts session id rotation store increment in credential verification and principal-construction contract. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Generate opaque session identifiers, store server-side state, rotate at authentication and privilege changes, expire idle and absolute lifetime, revoke, and prevent fixation.
Apply modern password hashing, salt, work policy, input bounds, constant-behavior comparison, breach and reset controls, rehash migration, and secret separation.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Node and Express server Predict Session Id Rotation Store · Theory Session Id Rotation Store
steps.instruction:
theory case — A theory team handles case 9992 in a multi-tenant case service with a bounded PostgreSQL pool. Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to validate bounded token claims and session rotation before constructing a principal; record only bounded redacted diagnostic fields; then reuse an idempotency key with different input and reject the fingerprint mismatch. Browser code models pure decisions only. Node, Express, listener, TLS, PostgreSQL, proxy, worker, load, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Generate opaque session identifiers, store server-side state, rotate at authentication and privilege changes, expire idle and absolute lifetime, revoke, and prevent fixation.

Before reading, predict which action preserves the Session Id Rotation Store contract for the supplied data.
